sections.title: About This Gallery
sections.body: This is a free-form text section. You can write anything here — your story, your process, a quote you love. Just edit the 'body' field in content.json to change this text. You can also add multiple paragraphs by using the 'paragraphs' array below.
paragraphs: Each photograph here represents a moment in time, captured and preserved.
I hope these images bring you as much joy as they brought me.
